errors.description: Required sealed audit archive is missing or does not match the evidence record chain.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification until archive binding is proven

errors.description: Evidence record chain hash continuity does not match canonical renewal metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification on broken chain continuity

errors.description: Required renewal timestamp metadata is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification until renewal timestamp continuity is present

errors.description: Evidence record uses an unsupported hash algorithm.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification until hash algorithm policy is satisfied

errors.description: Evidence record renewal round or reason is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification until renewal metadata is deterministic

errors.description: Renewal manifest append-only linkage is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification on append-only renewal violation

errors.description: A previously observed evidence record chain was reused.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification on replayed renewal evidence

errors.description: Evidence record append-only position is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification when renewal ordering is ambiguous

errors.description: Evidence record diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny evidence record verification until diagnostics are redacted and audit-safe
